title: Ways to Describe Emotions - HAPPINESS
description: Comprehensive guide to understanding happiness emotions, their triggers, manifestations, and effects

promptingEvents.description: Events that trigger feelings of happiness
events: Getting something you have worked hard for or worried about
Things turning out better than you thought they would
Belonging somewhere or with someone or a group
Being with or in contact with people who love or like you
Doing things that create or bring to mind pleasurable sensations

interpretations.description: Interpretations of events that prompt feelings of happiness
interpretations: Interpreting joyful events just as they are, without adding or subtracting

biologicalChanges.description: Biological changes and experiences of happiness
changes: Feeling calm all the way through
Urge to keep doing what is associated with happiness

behaviors: Using an enthusiastic or excited voice
Being talkative or talking a lot

effects: Being courteous or friendly to others
Doing nice things for other people
Having a positive outlook; seeing the bright side
Having a high threshold for worry or annoyance
Remembering and imagining other times you have felt joyful
Expecting more good things to happen
